title: pelargonium × agathosmum
intro: Pelargonium × agathosmum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant, which is native to South Africa. This plant is prized for its fragrant flowers and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Rose Geranium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
